message: We could present spatially an atomic fact which contradicted the laws of physics,
but not one which contradicted the laws of geometry.
Ludwig Josef Johann Wittgenstein - "Tractatus Logico-Philosophicus"
"A transparent..."
"A transparent white?"
"No, that's not it."
"There's no such thing as a transparent white."
"If it's white, then it's not transparent. So I guess it's only half-transparent."
"But still, this isn't really half-transparent."
"If I had to describe this..."
"A transparent white."
"This is... that."
'Light.'
"Light."
"Light?"
"This is."
"Just light."
"That's right... That's it."
"This is..."
"Light."

name: Yuki
message: "The sound of cicadas."

name: Yuki
message: "Is this the rooftop?"
I looked around and found myself in a familiar place. It was the Building A rooftop.

name: Yuki
message: "Why? Why am I here?"
Mamiya Tomosane jumped off the roof to protect Hasaki, and then...
And then...
What happened?

name: Yuki
message: "What day is today? Right now, it should be..."
I looked at the clock.
The date was July 20th, 2012.

name: Yuki
message: "It's been a whole day."
Mamiya Tomosane definitely fell from the rooftop, and before that, he received a serious knife wound in his chest.
I didn't know what condition his body was in, but he couldn't possibly have gotten released from the hospital already.
The fact that I was standing there was most definitely unnatural.

name: Yuki
message: "What's going on?"
Did Mamiya Tomosane survive?
No, the fact that I'm standing here, in such a strange place, means that I have to assume he's dead.
Either that, or this is the world of dreams again.
Or maybe this is a lucid dream?
I tried pinching my cheek.

name: Yuki
message: "Ow, that hurts."
If it was a dream, even a lucid dream, I would have felt less pain than normal.
Since I felt pain when I pinched my cheek, that meant that the scene unfolding before me was real.

name: Yuki
message: "Otonashi Ayana... san."

name: Ayana
message: "It has been a while."

name: Yuki
message: "Has it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hasn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "But it's only been one day since the last time we saw each other, hasn't it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, uh..."

name: Ayana
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "What happened to Mamiya Tomosane, anyway?"

name: Ayana
message: "Why are you asking that?"

name: Yuki
message: "W-Well, I'm curious. I'm just another personality that he created, after all."

name: Ayana
message: "Then he's alive, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean by that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hypothesis #1: If you are a personality that was created by Mamiya Tomosane, then the fact that you still exist is enough reason to believe that Mamiya Tomosane's body is still alive."

name: Yuki
message: "B-But that doesn't make sense."

name: Ayana
message: "Why not?"

name: Yuki
message: "Because he suffered serious wounds. He couldn't have come back here after just one day."

name: Ayana
message: "I agree."

name: Yuki
message: "Even if my personality did come to the surface, it'd be in a hospital bed or something."

name: Ayana
message: "Then, hypothesis #2: You didn't come into existence as a result of dissociative identity disorder."

name: Ayana
message: "Your existence is a continuation of the same person who existed in the past. You have the same soul as the real Minakami Yuki. If your soul merely came to reside in Mamiya Tomosane's body, then the reason must be..."

name: Ayana
message: "That must mean Mamiya Tomosane has died."

name: Yuki
message: "N-No way..."

name: Ayana
message: "Or how about this, hypothesis #3: If this is a dream that you're having, then..."

name: Ayana
message: "The Otonashi Ayana standing in front of you would be just another character in your dream. That hypothesis is also fairly convincing."

name: Ayana
message: "Now then, which explanation for the current situation do you prefer?"

name: Yuki
message: "Which do I prefer? That's not the problem at hand."

name: Ayana
message: "Hypothesis #4: You are just a figment of my imagination. A hallucination being produced by my brain. In other words, you don't exist."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha. Then what about me, the person having all of these thoughts right now?"

name: Yuki
message: "I think, therefore I am, right?"

name: Ayana
message: "Those thoughts could result from my brain activity as well. One part of my brain could simply perceive itself as a separate personality."

name: Ayana
message: "In other words, the fact that you think is not sufficient proof of your existence."

name: Ayana
message: "You can't deny the possibility that the presently existing Minakami Yuki is actually just another personality which I created."

name: Ayana
message: "After seeing that three personalities can simultaneously exist in one body, you should understand that possibility better than anyone."

name: Ayana
message: "The fact that you can think is not sufficient proof of your existence."

name: Yuki
message: "Um, there's something I'd like to know."

name: Ayana
message: "What's that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Like I was saying, what happened after everything that happened here?"

name: Ayana
message: "If you wish to know that, then you should go find out yourself. You can open the door and go out into the outside world at any time. That's all you need to do."
It was just as she said.
If I felt like it, I could leave at any time.
I could leave the rooftop and go see the outside world.
If I did that, then I could get my wish. I could see the aftermath of everything that happened.
But...

name: Yuki
message: "If I go outside, huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Yuki
message: "That's definitely one option, but can I ask you something?"

name: Ayana
message: "What?"

name: Yuki
message: "What day is today?"

name: Yuki
message: "Which means that tomorrow is the first day of summer vacation?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. Tomorrow is the first day of summer vacation."
Yesterday, a group suicide happened here.
Summer vacation or no, that would make this a crime scene.
And yet, looking out from the rooftop...
Everything looked perfectly normal.
Students walking through the halls.
Students chatting in the classrooms.
Teachers lecturing their students.
Everything was completely normal.
This couldn't be the aftermath of such a tragedy.

name: Ayana
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Yuki
message: "Is that the last hypothesis you have?"

name: Ayana
message: "Do you want to hear another hypothesis?"

name: Ayana
message: "We can come up with as many explanations as you would like. It's possible to create as many different annotations for this world as you want."

name: Ayana
message: "If that is what you wish, then we can make as many as you like."

name: Yuki
message: "What is the 'End Sky' that Takuji-kun was talking about?"

name: Yuki
message: "That is a word which wasn't in either Kotomi-san's prophecy or the White Lotus Association's prophecy."

name: Ayana
message: "End Sky... It is just that, 'the sky of the end.'"

name: Yuki
message: "Who gave it that name, and when?"

name: Ayana
message: "Memory..."

name: Yuki
message: "Memory?"

name: Ayana
message: "Spirit room. End Sky."

name: Yuki
message: "Wha-!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe. So you do remember it."

name: Yuki
message: "I remember it? Those memories can't be right..."

name: Ayana
message: "Really?"

name: Yuki
message: "B-But that's really strange, isn't it?"

name: Ayana
message: "How so?"

name: Yuki
message: "But, I mean, that was a dream I saw when I got dragged into Takashima-san's suicide, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't that really strange?"

name: Ayana
message: "What's strange about it?"

name: Yuki
message: "I mean, after that, when I got involved in Takashima-san's suicide... It's like the whole sequence of events got messed up. I remember experiencing her suicide a second time after that."

name: Ayana
message: "Hypothesis #5: You still haven't woken from that dream."

name: Yuki
message: "That dream?"

name: Ayana
message: "The Minakami Yuki that got dragged into Takashima Zakuro's suicide is still having that same dream at this very moment."

name: Yuki
message: "A-A dream? This is a dream? No, there's no way this could be a dream..."

name: Ayana
message: "Okay. Then, hypothesis #6: Your memories of the spirit room and the End Sky are all false memories."

name: Ayana
message: "The constant changes of personality caused your memories to get confused, and as a result you just dreamed about the spirit room."

name: Ayana
message: "Takashima Zakuro didn't actually fall on you when she jumped off the building. That was just a result of your confused memory."

name: Yuki
message: "Then why did Takuji-kun use that same word, 'End Sky,' that appeared in my dream?!"

name: Ayana
message: "You both share the same brain. It shouldn't be surprising that he knows about that."

name: Yuki
message: "B-But then..."

name: Ayana
message: "The last scene you saw... Are you interested in that sky?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah!"
The last thing I saw... That sky...
The scene which Mamiya Takuji-kun saw at that very moment when he jumped.
I felt like I knew that scene, somehow.

name: Ayana
message: "A world which repeats from a certain point..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "Would you confirm it?"

name: Yuki
message: "C-Confirm what?"

name: Ayana
message: "Are you really Minakami Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What are you asking me now? Isn't that what you called me, yourself?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yuki-san... Who is Minakami Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yuki-san was a person who existed in the past. That person died in the act of saving Mamiya Hasaki. After that, she also existed as another personality that manifested in Mamiya Tomosane's body."

name: Ayana
message: "In that case, who is the Yuki-san standing here right now? The Yuki-san that died? Or the Yuki-san who was created as another one of Mamiya Tomosane's personalities?"

name: Yuki
message: "I-I can't answer that question... I don't know."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't know. That's why you asked me."

name: Ayana
message: "A final annotation."

name: Ayana
message: "A question for you, Yuki-san."

name: Ayana
message: "How many Yuki-sans exist in this world?"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "One Yuki-san was born in Sawaimura, and she died in Sawaimura. Another one was created as one of Mamiya Tomosane's personalities. And then, one more Yuki-san exists who is standing here, talking to me."

name: Ayana
message: "That is the problem. How many Minakami Yuki-sans came before you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I-I don't know. Wait, I'm me. There aren't any others!"

name: Ayana
message: "The Yuki-san that died in Sawaimura, the Yuki-san inside Tomosane-kun, and the Yuki-san here now are all the same."

name: Ayana
message: "Then what about the other Yuki-sans that might exist?"

name: Yuki
message: "The other copies of me that might exist?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. The Yuki-sans that existed as other personalities. Would they be you as well, Yuki-san?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know. Were there really that many of me?!"

name: Ayana
message: "But the reality is that you weren't just one person."

name: Ayana
message: "The Yuki-san that was caught up in Takashima Zakuro's suicide, the Yuki-san that died in Sawaimura, the Yuki-san that was created by Tomosane-kun, and the Yuki-san that is right here."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know. I'm just me."

name: Ayana
message: "The scene you saw in the spirit room... The End Sky. When did that scene happen?"

name: Yuki
message: "Scene?"

name: Yuki
message: "Ah!"
At that moment, strangely enough, I remembered the expiration date on a bag of potato chips I found in that attraction.
I remembered the date on the calendar on the wall.
I didn't at all understand what it meant, but...
Somehow, I remembered that date.
I didn't know whether those words had any meaning.
The only thing that particularly stood out in my mind was the date.

name: Ayana
message: "The final annotation that I could give you..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hypothesis #7: Every existence was created by one soul."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What do you mean?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe. If all of the different Yuki-sans that existed really were Yuki-san, then the world doesn't require very many souls to exist."

name: Ayana
message: "If a single soul viewed every perspective, that would be enough."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't understand what you're saying. That's..."

name: Ayana
message: "Takashima Zakuro, Mamiya Tomosane, and Mamiya Takuji. Even Mamiya Hasaki, Wakatsuki Kagami, and Wakatsuki Tsukasa. A single soul saw each and every one of those scenes."

name: Yuki
message: "That would be too strange. The time overlaps."

name: Ayana
message: "If you're going to say that, then you have to consider that the Yuki-san who was caught up in Takashima Zakuro-san's suicide existed at the same time as the Yuki-san who was not caught up in her suicide."

name: Ayana
message: "Ubiquitous transmigration."

name: Yuki
message: "Ubiquitous transmigration?"

name: Ayana
message: "The endless reincarnation of a single soul."

name: Ayana
message: "Beyond the pale of time and space, the soul reincarnates endlessly. If that was possible, then the entire world wouldn't need more than one soul."

name: Ayana
message: "The world is created through the endless transmigration of just one soul."

name: Ayana
message: "It would be more unnatural for every living organism to have its own soul. The number of organisms is different in every moment. There would always be too many or too few souls for all the living organisms in the world."

name: Ayana
message: "So if the number of souls is just one, reincarnation would be the most suitable answer."

name: Ayana
message: "If one soul lives in all of life, then there is no problem."

name: Yuki
message: "That's... ridiculous."

name: Ayana
message: "Is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "This explanation could solve a great number of the world's mysteries."

name: Yuki
message: "Like what?"

name: Ayana
message: "Why are people able to understand each other?"

name: Ayana
message: "If every person is a different existence, with a different perspective... If every person has a different world, then how do people understand each other?"

name: Ayana
message: "You can't explain it."

name: Ayana
message: "If they both see the color red, how do they know that they're both seeing the same red color?"

name: Ayana
message: "Tomosane-kun talked about a thought experiment, where one person might see the world through glasses that mirrored the world left to right and top to bottom."

name: Ayana
message: "I can understand that I am seeing the same world as other people because there is a consistency with the world that other people see."

name: Ayana
message: "But where does that understanding come from?"

name: Ayana
message: "How can you say that the sensations of sight, sound, touch, smell, and taste which I feel are the same as those which others feel?"

name: Ayana
message: "For instance... Pain."

name: Ayana
message: "How do I understand another person's pain?"

name: Yuki
message: "From their expression or behavior. You can listen to the words they're saying, too."

name: Ayana
message: "That doesn't make for a sufficient explanation. In that case, the 'pain' which I understand could be different than the 'pain' which he or she is feeling."

name: Yuki
message: "Then you have to use your imagination."

name: Ayana
message: "Imagination. In other words, you can feel another person's pain by imagining that they feel the same pain that you do."

name: Ayana
message: "Then let's suppose that I feel 'pain' in this arm. Then I move that 'pain' to my fingertips."

name: Ayana
message: "Then I move the 'pain' from my fingertips to the ground when I touch it with my fingertips. Then at that moment, I should feel 'pain' in the ground. Then I move that 'pain' from the ground into your leg."

name: Ayana
message: "That's how I would move the 'pain' I feel from my body to another person so that I could feel their pain."

name: Ayana
message: "That's the only way you could 'imagine another person's pain.'"

name: Ayana
message: "That 'pain' could be attributed to the ground, the clothes you wear, or even a book or desk. If you simply attribute pain to another thing through your imagination, then it holds no more meaning than 'pain' attributed to a book or a desk."

name: Yuki
message: "I can base my understanding in the pain which I can feel, but I have to use my imagination to feel pain which I cannot feel."

name: Yuki
message: "That argument comes from the philosopher Wittgenstein, doesn't it?"

name: Yuki
message: "To feel another person's pain is not the same thing as using your imagination to move the pain from your body to another person's body."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe. You know the answer, but you're playing dumb."

name: Ayana
message: "Why does 'pain' hold the same meaning for both you and another person?"

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So you're trying to say that every person is just another 'me,' right?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. That is hypothesis #7."

name: Ayana
message: "Every single person is 'me,' including the miserable wretch and the beautiful girl."

name: Ayana
message: "Both the young man who becomes a bully and the young man who is bullied."

name: Ayana
message: "The pathetic, the filthy, the beautiful, and the proud. All of them are 'me.'"

name: Ayana
message: "The entire world is made up of 'me.' That's why I can understand you."

name: Ayana
message: "I understand your pain. I understand your sadness. I understand your happiness."

name: Ayana
message: "The world has an infinite number of 'me.'"

name: Yuki
message: "That's a really grotesque theory, isn't it?"

name: Ayana
message: "But hypothesis #7 would explain everything. It would explain everything which you felt was incomprehensible in this world."

name: Yuki
message: "That's not the only explanation. There are plenty of explanations that would explain it."

name: Yuki
message: "God created the world as it is five minutes ago. Martians came to Earth and messed with the memory of everyone on Earth. You could come up with as many ridiculous explanations as you want."

name: Yuki
message: "But those are all..."

name: Ayana
message: "Places whereof we cannot speak."

name: Yuki
message: "Haa... So what then? What does it mean if hypothesis #7 is correct? Did the first soul come into existence when the world's first lifeform was born?"

name: Yuki
message: "Or did it all come from some kind of special place in time or space? Did everything originate from a certain point like that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe. It could be said to start from any point you wish."

name: Ayana
message: "For instance, maybe it started at the moment of Takashima Zakuro-san's suicide. The ubiquitous transmigration of souls."

name: Yuki
message: "Living through the same world over and over as different versions of 'me'... So you mean she might've lived through a different future?"

name: Ayana
message: "Or perhaps it was on that summer day when Yuki-san died in Sawaimura when the soul began its ubiquitous transmigration."

name: Ayana
message: "Or perhaps it was a mysterious point in the past which you don't remember. Perhaps everything began at one point, when the End Sky appeared. The ubiquitous transmigration of souls..."

name: Yuki
message: "When the End Sky appeared?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean? Is there such a point?"

name: Ayana
message: "It's just a hypothesis. That is one more possibility which you could imagine."

name: Ayana
message: "A certain point, a day which was called the end of the world... Even though the world ended at that point, the soul continues to make the world loop time and time again, as if it still existed."

name: Yuki
message: "What kind of hypothesis is that?"

name: Ayana
message: "It's just an annotation. It's just one more kind of explanation which we could come up with."

name: Ayana
message: "I don't know whether you prefer that explanation over the last."

name: Yuki
message: "If I... prefer it?"
I closed my eyes.
Maybe the world ended a long time ago, in the distant past.
The soul which I call 'me'... I feel like it must have taken these same actions millions or billions of times already.
Maybe I acted the role of every single one of the world's souls.
At times I'm Minakami Yuki.
At times I'm Mamiya Takuji.
At times I'm Yuuki Tomosane.
At times I'm Takashima Zakuro.
At times I'm Mamiya Hasaki.
At times I'm Wakatsuki Kagami.
At times I'm Wakatsuki Tsukasa.
At times I'm Minakami Yuki.
At times I'm Mamiya Takuji.
At times I'm Yuuki Tomosane.
At times I'm Takashima Zakuro.
At times I'm Mamiya Hasaki.
At times I'm Wakatsuki Kagami.
At times I'm Wakatsuki Tsukasa.
And...
Once again...
I feel as if I'm doing it all for the first time.
Well...
It doesn't really matter either way.
Now...
That's it.
The sky.
It's the sky.
I can see the sky.
Why is the sky...
Why is the sky blue?
And why...
Why do we sense that it is blue?
The endless sky.
The blue of the sky.
It must be...
...probably.
Where does the sky lead to?
It must...
It must lead to the skies of all the rest of the world.
Which means that this sky leads to...
The End Sky.
No, they're not connected.
Because, after all...
That is...
Something which must not be true.
But...
Is that true?
A voice called out to me from somewhere.
The voice of a classmate was calling out to me.
I turned around.

name: Miu
message: "Otonashi Ayana-saaan."

name: Ayana
message: "Hello."

name: Miu
message: "Haa, haa... Jeez, I was looking for you!"

name: Miu
message: "Gosh, why are you alone here? The graduation ceremony is starting."

name: Ayana
message: "It's starting..."

name: Miu
message: "That's right. It's starting right now."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe..."

name: Miu
message: "Wh-What is it?"

name: Ayana
message: "It all just ended, and now we're starting again?"

name: Miu
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "No, never mind. Let's go."

name: Ayana
message: "Let's go to that point where it all begins."
